ingredients_text: liefmans fruitesse fruitbier:gearomatiseerd, met suiker at zoetstof, ingredienten: water, gerstemout, tarwemout, is% yruchten (kriek, framboos, bosbes, vlierbes, aardbei, fructose,zmate wortelconcentrat, aroma, hop, zoetstof: acesulfaam-k biere fruitee: amonatie, wec suche et edulcorant, ingrédients: uae, malt d'orge, malt de ble, 15% frus censes framboises, myrtilles, sureaux, fraises), fructose, concentre de carotte hoire, aruhe, houblon, edulcorant: acesulfame-k fruit beer: flavoured, with sugar and sweterea ngredients: water, barley malt, wheat halt, i5%fruits (chery, raspbery, buerai, edergery, strawberry fructose, black carrot concentrate, aróma, hop, sweeterer eamel frucht bier: aromatis mitiert, gesst zuckér und substof, ua mmer, gerstenmalz weizenmalz 15% frucht (kirschen, himbeere, heidelrer, holunderbeere, erdbeere), fructose, schwarzes karotenkonzentrat, aroma, koper sumstoff: acesulfame-k, fruit beer: flavoured, sugar and sweetener ngredienter water , barley halta, wheat kalta, i5% fruit (cherries, franbuesas mandanos, sauco berries, strawberries), fructose, carrot concentrate, aroha lupulo, sweetener: acesulfamo-k, birra fruttata: aromatizzata, with zucchero e doloficate warediente acqua, malto d'orzo, kalto di frumento, frutta 15% (ciliegitm l'mpone, hatlio, baca di sambuco, fragola), fruttosio, concentrato di carote nere, aroh, dolopcante: acesulf ame-k, cerveja com fruits: flavoured, com a-ucar e adcgamte noredentes: water, cevada malte, wheat malte, fruits vermechas is% (cnea rambdesa, hintilo, baga de sabugueiro, morango), frutose, cenoura concentrate preta mona lipulo, adocante: acesulfame-k 0.006 g/100ml frukt-l: smaksatt hed fl'der och ugubal nnehaller socker och sotningsmedel ingredienser: vatten, kornmalt wetemalt, 19% frukt (korsb-r, hallon, blabar, fl-der, jordgubb), frukto, sar hokotioncentrat, aromer, humle , sotningsmedel: acesulfame-k he920r perderry stra wberr

ingredients_text_es: LIEFMANS FRUITESSE FRUITBIER:GEAROMATISEERD, MET SUIKER EN ZOETSTOF, INGREDIENTEN: WATER, GERSTEMOUT, TARWEMOUT, IS% YRUCHTEN (KRIEK, FRAMBOOS, BOSBES, VLIERBES, AARDBEI, FRUCTOSE,ZMATE WORTELCONCENTRAT, AROMA, HOP, ZOETSTOF: ACESULFAAM-K BIERE FRUITEE: AMONATIE, WEC SUCHE ET EDULCORANT, INGRÉDIENTS: EAU, MALT D'ORGE, MALT DE BLE, 15% DE FRUS CENSES FRAMBOISES, MYRTILLES, SUREAUX, FRAISES), FRUCTOSE, CONCENTRE DE CAROTTE HOIRE, ARÔHE, HOUBLON, EDULCORANT: ACESULFAME-K FRUIT BEER: FLAVOURED, WITH SUGAR AND SWETEREA NGREDIENTS: WATER, BARLEY MALT, WHEAT HALT, I5%FRUITS (CHERY, RASPBERY, BUERAI, EDERGERY, STRAWBERRY FRUCTOSE, BLACK CARROT CONCENTRATE, ARÓMA, HOP, SWEETERER EAMEL FRUCHT BIER: AROMATISIERT, GESÜST MIT ZUCKÉR UND SUBSTOF, UA MMER, GERSTENMALZ WEIZENMALZ 15% FRUCHT (KIRSCHEN, HIMBEERE, HEIDELRER, HOLUNDERBEERE, ERDBEERE), FRUCTOSE, SCHWARZES KAROTENKONZENTRAT, AROMA, KOPER SUMSTOFF: ACESULFAME-K, CERVEZA DE FRUTA: AROMATIZADA, CON AZÚCAR Y EDULCORANTE NGREDIENTER AGUA, HALTA DE CEBADA, KALTA DE TRIGO, I5% DE FRUTAS (CEREZAS, FRANBUESAS MANDANOS, BAYAS DE SAUCO, FRESAS), FRUCTOSA, CONCENTRADO DE ZANAHORIA NÈGRĄ, AROHA LUPULO, EDULCOMANTE: ACESULFAMO-K, BIRRA FRUTTATA: AROMATIZZATA, CON ZUCCHERO E DOLOFICATE WAREDIENTE ACQUA, MALTO D'ORZO, KALTO DI FRUMENTO, FRUTTA 15% (CILIEGIĄ LÄMPONE, HATLIO, BACA DI SAMBUCO, FRAGOLA), FRUTTOSIO, CONCENTRATO DI CAROTE NERE, AROH, LUPPLO, DOLOPCANTE: ACESULF AME-K, CERVEJA COM FRUTAS: AROMATIZADA, COM AÇUCAR E ADCGAMTE NOREDENTES: AGUA, MALTE DE CEVADA, MALTE DE TRIGO, FRUTAS VERMECHAS IS% (CNEA RAMBDESA, HINTILO, BAGA DE SABUGUEIRO, MORANGO), FRUTOSE, CONCENTRADO DE CENOURA PRETA MONA LIPULO, ADOCANTE: ACESULFAME-K 0,006G/100ML FRUKTÖL: SMAKSATT HED FLÅDER OCH UGUBAL NNEHALLER SOCKER OCH SOTNINGSMEDEL INGREDIENSER: VATTEN, KORNMALT WETEMALT, 19% FRUKT (KÖRSBÅR, HALLON, BLABAR, FLÄDER, JORDGUBB), FRUKTO, SAR HOKOTIONCENTRAT, AROMER, HUMLE, SOTNINGSMEDEL: ACESULFAME-K HE920R PERDERRY STRA WBERR
ingredients_text_fr: WA BAAS DE SAO REYO FNCTOSI (ONCENTIADO DE ZANARORAEGL AAPA SE: KESEAEL CERVEZA DE FRUTA: ANOMATIZADA, CON AICA Y ALE NUEL GERSTENMALZ, WEIZENMALZ, IS% FRUCHT (KIRSCHEN, HIMBEERE, HEDEEE UNENREENE, ENDBEENE, FRUCTOSE, SCHWARZES KAROTTENKONZENTRAT ARON KPER NEET NGUA, MALTA DE CEBADA, NALTA DE TRIGO, IS% DE FRUTAS (CEREDE FSER WOKTELCONCENTIAT, AROMA, HOP, 2OETSTOF: ACESULFAAM - BIÈRE FRUITÉE: ANSE E SICIE ET EDULCORANT, NGRÉDIENTS: EAU, MALT D'ORGE, HALT DE BLÉ, ISN DE FRS A FANBOSES, MRTLES SUREAUT, FRAISES, FRUCTOSE, CONCENTRÉ DE CAROITE NOR, Rt HOOK.ON, EDULCOMANT: ACÉSULFAMEK FRUIT BEER: FLAVOURED, WITH SUGAR AND SHEFIER AENTE MATEL, BARLEY MALT, WHEAT HALT, IS% FRUITS CHERN, ASPRERA, KUEK, BEENA, STRANBERY, FROUCTOSE, BLACK CARROT CONCENTRATE, AROMA KP, SHEE KENEREA FRUCHT BIER: AROMATISIERT, GESİST MI UCKER UND SURSIOFE UER, GERSTENMALZ WEIZENMALZ IS% FRUCHT ORSCHEN, HIMBEERE, HEDERIR NERNEENE, ENDBEENE FRUCIOSE SERWANIES KAROTENKONZENTRAT, AROA K KRY 30RAW
